---
name: backlog-baseliner
description: Reframe active backlog items into the target hierarchy of project, epic, feature, and task. Use during adoption after the current workflow has been mapped.
---

Use this skill to organize active work without rewriting repository history.

## Goal

Give the team a clean baseline for current and upcoming work while leaving old closed work largely intact.

## Process

1. Focus on open work and the current or next milestone.
2. Group issues into the target hierarchy where it helps planning clarity.
3. Identify missing parent issues or milestone links.
4. Recommend the smallest useful set of restructuring changes.

## Guardrails

- Do not rewrite closed history just for consistency.
- Do not move large numbers of issues without approval.
- Do not regenerate the backlog from scratch if it can be reconciled incrementally.
